mapper.select: SELECT USERNAME, PASSWORD_HASH, STATUS, ACCOUNT_LOCKED, DELETED_AT FROM M_USER WHERE USERNAME = #{username}

SELECT authority FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.ROLE_CODE LIKE 'ROLE_%' THEN r.ROLE_CODE ELSE CONCAT('ROLE_', r.ROLE_CODE) END AS authority FROM M_USER u INNER JOIN M_USER_ROLE ur ON ur.USER_ID = u.ID INNER JOIN M_ROLE r ON r.ID = ur.ROLE_ID WHERE u.USERNAME = #{username} AND u.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND r.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND r.STATUS = 1
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT p.PERMISSION_CODE AS authority FROM M_USER u INNER JOIN M_USER_ROLE ur ON ur.USER_ID = u.ID INNER JOIN M_ROLE r ON r.ID = ur.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN M_ROLE_PERMISSION rp ON rp.ROLE_ID = ur.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN M_PERMISSION p ON p.ID = rp.PERMISSION_ID WHERE u.USERNAME = #{username} AND u.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND r.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND r.STATUS = 1 AND p.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND p.STATUS = 1 ) authorities
